targets.query:
SELECT LAST("processValue") AS "acid_current",
LAST("LCL") AS "acid_min",
LAST("UCL") AS "acid_max",
LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ACID'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"

SELECT "processValue" AS "acid_current",
"LCL" AS "acid_min",
"UCL" AS "acid_max"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ACID'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT LAST("processValue") AS "alkaline_current",
LAST("LCL") AS "alkaline_min",
LAST("UCL") AS "alkaline_max",
LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ALKALINE'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"

SELECT "processValue" AS "alkaline_current",
"LCL" AS "alkaline_min",
"UCL" AS "alkaline_max"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ALKALINE'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT LAST("value") AS "value"
FROM "caaLevelPressureStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "item"

SELECT "value" AS "level_current"
FROM "caaLevelPressureStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "item" =~ /^DIL_(ACID|ALK)_T[12]$/
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "item"
ORDER BY time ASC
